productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual White Shoes
description: These numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold stitch detailing and aggressive design highlights. Rough up your ensemble with this cowboy referenced sneaker. Wear them with fitted denims and a tee. Throw on a tonal jacket for added style. Upper Textured synthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and style Stitched synthetic overlays for midfoot support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Synthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfort Printed branding on tongue for style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for maximum traction and grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
